entries.gt_092d5cfcceaee5: Mitya. Liquidator. The order was simple until someone else's palm showed through it.
entries.gt_5e75c5dc76cf9d: A breakaway reserve lies in the cache. I do not remember whether I hid it from the cult or for the cult.
entries.gt_d32ba7a59091c2: If you report to Rogozha, I go back into formation or into the basement. If you stay quiet, at least I sleep without the radio.
entries.gt_d01719d396c499: My hands shake less. That does not mean I am clean.
entries.gt_216a13d5e79ac5: If you hear my call sign in the fog, do not answer right away.
entries.gt_b44fcd4e9d2fdf: Rogozha. People are returned to formation by report, not by pity.
entries.gt_dea1df152e0bc1: A black palm on an order is not mysticism. It is a reason to open someone's locker.
entries.gt_bb10e3cde254b8: Doubt has been entered for accounting. The guard will handle it from here.
entries.gt_e97e8c313d49b4: I heard Mitya's call sign on a cult frequency. He was not praying. He was asking to be ordered back.
entries.gt_e9962a23a07e83: A scratched token can be put on the air as a hook. A living informant is more useful than a dead report.
entries.gt_3f5b2069082a4b: The channel hisses with his breathing. So for now he is ours, not theirs.
entries.gt_37731f6811e63d: Do not shout. The exhausted hear Chernobog better because they have already stopped listening to command.
entries.gt_28f140102a79ed: Give me his token. We will not take Mitya by force. We will give him a reason not to return.
entries.gt_18103ef7f715df: The palm closed. Now the order will look for another hand.
entries.gt_4bc1ae49b1e662: Compromise with the cult ends with a hole in the back. Mitya is tired, which means he became the hole.
entries.gt_563a282c94eceb: If he is already marked, take the token off the body. No extra words.
entries.gt_56c4994686dbe1: A sweep is quieter than a report. Sometimes that is the whole difference.
entries.gt_18ec51151547dc: Mitya: "Check my breakaway cache {dir}. There is an order, a ration, and a palm sign there. If you do not come back before guard change, they will take me without you."
entries.gt_6772294a1f8998: Found the liquidator breakaway cache with a black palm and a torn order.
entries.gt_c39f1a87d509f7: Mitya: "Bring me the token from the cache. I will hide the scratch and go on guard myself before Rogozha reads the order."
entries.gt_3d5ac898713229: The compromising token was returned to Mitya; the doubt was hidden from the guard.
entries.gt_411cacf27fb879: Rogozha: "Bring the scratched token. We will return Mitya to formation under supervision, and put the cult trace in a separate box."
entries.gt_26c56d15ec80d0: Mitya Breakaway was returned to formation under liquidator supervision.
entries.gt_f43d0fcd7fe01b: Lida: "Give the token to me. I will run Mitya like a live wire: let the cult think he is already their man."
entries.gt_0597a7ed0de893: Mitya was recruited as a living informant against the Chernobog followers.
entries.gt_f9eeef1a210ced: Senya: "Turn the token in to me. Mitya can decide how to leave, but the guard will no longer find the road to him."
entries.gt_60157edfc4e5eb: Mitya's token was handed to an external Chernobog cell.
entries.gt_0855a5dafa82e8: Terekh: "Kill Mitya and take what drops. If a man already listens to the palm, a report only dirties the desk."
entries.gt_3b8d11edb7072b: Mitya Breakaway was killed; his token and ration remained as loot.
entries.gt_8e22724838d350: Mitya stayed in formation without a report. The liquidators came up short on truth; the tenants got a debtor.
entries.gt_983d9169db19ee: Rogozha took the token. Mitya was returned to the post under supervision; the cult trace went into the liquidator box.
entries.gt_8b03db773eee24: Lida put Mitya's fear on the air. Now he is an informant, not a body in a report.
entries.gt_1895683f876fbf: Senya carried the token to the Chernobog followers. Mitya was left not freedom, but another reason to obey.
entries.gt_1eb6949d5f8f0b: Terekh received silence instead of an answer. Mitya's reserve is loot now, and the doubt was written off by a bullet.
entries.gt_95eb96c50d68bb: The guard change passed without a decision. Mitya was led away, and the black palm stayed in the rumors.
entries.gt_d15dc71ba247f7: Mitya was killed without a decision. His things can be taken, but the guard remembered more than the token.
entries.gt_d616460f062b65: Black palm smoking corner: outside whisper
entries.gt_c12f046ddb0607: Engineer Bokova, NII of Slime. Field post, so anything still signable counts as clean.
entries.gt_883f5394c80eb1: I sell empty containers by logbook and form 728/01-D. A free jar only comes with responsibility for its contents.
entries.gt_1d8951204c7b4d: Hand the brown sample to me - the NII gets a fact. Give it to the liquidators - the fact burns. Carry it to market - the fact rises in price.
entries.gt_7d3f8ce0086260: Access was approved by the deputy institute director: not one jar is opened in the Living Zone, even if it is transparent and looks empty.
entries.gt_dcce12426867ed: A broken seal is not fixed with words. You either surrender it by report, or hide it and live with the smell recording you first.
entries.gt_dfd9a5726fae02: Sample accepted. If it starts smelling like a surname, that is no longer my shift.
entries.gt_334a181dd4da7c: Do not open the next container in the corridor. The corridor is not listed as a laboratory.
entries.gt_957ece302fe4a1: Sereda. Attached to the NII so science does not confuse curiosity with evacuation.
entries.gt_1e86c2d1a88439: Do we need the sample? We do. But if it moves, I vote with the burner, not the protocol.
entries.gt_25bbcff6324aa7: The black mass is not one sample, no matter how many jars Bokova puts on the table.
entries.gt_dceb99a65e78bd: Hand the seal to me and you get a filter and fuel. The scientists will be offended on paper; the market will be offended in money.
entries.gt_8a0ba5d239995d: Red sticks, green eats, blue glows, black multiplies. All of it looks good only from the furnace.
entries.gt_1730f8645b342f: The seal was written off for burning. If the NII asks, I saw only a storage violation.
entries.gt_7caa574aaf38f0: I do not pity the jars. I pity people when they start believing jars.
entries.gt_10c0525dd68803: Senya Test Tube. I am not a market here, I am a temporary window without a sign.
entries.gt_e8cffe4ceba365: A sealed sample is worth more until someone calls it evidence. Do not touch the seal, do not spoil the price.
entries.gt_33b4116f782d55: The scientists get a conclusion, the liquidators get smoke, and you may get money. Risk is included in the container.
entries.gt_4a3f00f005f314: A crooked sample can be hidden under an act. Just do not call it storage, or the act will take offense and find a witness.
entries.gt_9e688303aee376: The sample left without an invoice. So the invoice betrayed nobody.
entries.gt_5744a39c0b6fcd: If they ask, we traded empty jars and bad advice.
entries.gt_c0cc966f6a7148: Bokova: "Start with the dry bypass: bring the toxic brown slime sweep act. Take the sealed sample there too, if you decide to argue with science, the furnace, or the market."
entries.gt_9b8c419a383193: Collectors: dry bypass with brown residue. The act lies beside the sweep kit; the sample is needed for surrender, burning, or quiet sale.
entries.gt_14eebf87734088: Slime sweep act accepted at the NII post
entries.gt_ad35d57d792258: Bokova: "Now bring the brown sample in its seal and do not open the jar in the Living Zone. The NII will record it as a fact, and you as responsible for the fact."
entries.gt_e4ce74f217df6a: Collectors: brown sample from the dry bypass or issued container. Do not open the seal before the NII post.
entries.gt_353aa9f4464c45: Bokova: "If the seal is already crooked, carry the infected sample as a storage violation. The reward is smaller, but the NII writes a report, not a search for the jar."
entries.gt_eb9c21e558a5e6: Collectors: NII field post. Surrender the crookedly sealed sample to Bokova by report; do not sell it as clean.
entries.gt_b0a622585400d7: Sereda: "Give me that same brown sample. We will record it as hazardous residue and burn it without scientific pride."
entries.gt_0b2cbb9c83451f: Collectors: after the sweep act, take the brown sample and give it to the liquidator at the NII post, or carry it farther to the furnace.
entries.gt_a612878dec150c: Senya: "Sample to me, seal intact. The log will show a shortage; you get money and one more reason not to linger."
entries.gt_aaa93af433d085: Collectors: brown sample after the dry bypass. For the market, the intact seal and no extra witnesses matter.
entries.gt_888fd1158c0245: Senya: "A crooked sample can be not sold, but hidden under a fake act. Less money, but the NII looks for paper, not you."
entries.gt_d94eaedd10ad0a: Collectors: a crookedly sealed sample can be hidden with Senya at the field post if you do not want Bokova's report.
entries.gt_cdef75c684e7f6: Sample surrendered to the NII by logbook
entries.gt_2aa90f99e1accd: Sample handed to liquidators for burning
entries.gt_bcfff9600e2ad4: Sample went to market without an invoice
entries.gt_269da09c2da369: Crooked seal went into an NII report
entries.gt_9f8c62a2fb8156: Crooked sample hidden under a fake act
entries.gt_f30f99273d3e87: Wet card file of flooded passages
entries.gt_89b23c48e9712c: Varya Pressure. I have two risers and one lever: the Living Zone drinks, the Apartments dry out, or the other way around.
entries.gt_76e7457e3049de: Need two valve tags. Without tags, water counts as rumor and flows wherever it wants.
entries.gt_ac07f019ad1c3a: The pressure bridge holds only an honest pressure gauge. Bring the needle and I will open the dry jumper by act.
entries.gt_3fce9a2213a06c: First discharge recorded. The second lever is now only for pretty words.
entries.gt_1231f076184b52: If someone upstairs is cursing at the water, the pressure arrived.
entries.gt_8b9a7edb2a63e7: I am a cartographer. Not all drowned: the hands still draw, the legs already believe the water.
entries.gt_cae29831bf015b: In the wet card file, routes float up only under a lamp. Check the board and do not step on the shine.
entries.gt_38c151e12e09f3: The filters are needed upstairs. Dirty water is still water, but without a filter the queue starts coughing.
entries.gt_414423777e6b59: The map dried around the edges. That is enough to leave and come back not the same person.
entries.gt_ccfb89ff73cd97: The filters reached accounting. The water was issued separately, on a wet receipt.
entries.gt_a46558b1e5c742: Ilyas Eel-Man. An eel is fast in water, angry on concrete, but already honest.
entries.gt_9094312e42bdb3: Do not climb into the trough after it. Lure it to the dry edge and hit while it counts air as a mistake.
entries.gt_f337578064f998: Three eels and I hand over the harpoons without argument. Fewer than three is not a hunt, it is an introduction.
entries.gt_c56f3d86a37c4e: The trough quieted down. Either the eels are gone, or they got smarter.
entries.gt_a210250b0b3de1: Save the harpoons. Water loves those who conserve ammunition.
entries.gt_bac6540185b928: Fedya Broken-Seal. The part was not stolen; it was temporarily saved from management.
entries.gt_3690d3dcb2b2d9: Give me coupons and I will throw the pressure into the apartment riser. The Living Zone will cough through the tap, but the riot will fade.
entries.gt_d5542195e81ccd: Bring sealant and I will return part of the seal. Not all of it: I need something to live on too.
entries.gt_6205c1c02f575f: The seal is held by a word of honor. A wet word, but honorable.
entries.gt_70c5fc02a48a82: If Varya asks, I was here before the accident and after the report.
entries.gt_721b40824d45dd: Varya: "Two valve tags and I open the Living main. The Living Zone gets water, the Apartments lose pressure."
entries.gt_da7da26a4f190a: Varya: "Pressure gauge to the pressure bridge. Without the needle, the dry jumper counts as a wet legend."
entries.gt_75510a294f6b52: Cartographer: "Check the wet card file {dir}. A route floated up there before the eels ate it."
entries.gt_cb543ef4f768cd: Cartographer: "Two filters into accounting. We will carry clean issue upstairs, not a wet explanation."
entries.gt_6d1bd97464713a: Ilyas: "Three Tube Eels in the trough. Shoot from the dry edge; do not try growing gills."
entries.gt_cb8264bf8964d0: Fedya: "Two water coupons and I will throw the pressure into the Apartments. The Apartments drink; the Living Zone loses pressure."
entries.gt_ad626ae8e7764b: Fedya: "Two sealants for the stolen seal. We will call it repair until Varya opens the cabinet."
entries.gt_ae3edaf7f2bcff: Discharge fixed: the Living Zone got water, the Apartments lost pressure.
entries.gt_72bb88bbaf0988: Discharge fixed: the Apartments got pressure, the Living Zone grew drier.
entries.gt_acd7a8906382af: Collector discharge is already fixed: the second lever only makes noise in the pipes.
entries.gt_3218ec8e70478e: bring the keys to the pressure dispatcher
entries.gt_c4264772f0890f: remove the Rebar at the pumps
entries.gt_a934601db8ee39: lead Olgoy-Khorkhoy off the water onto dry floor
entries.gt_3a76354e602a1c: take the meat stash by the pipe without a fight
entries.gt_5069b8f6c9ebe3: kill Olgoy-Khorkhoy away from the trough
entries.gt_69f2bdf52e4a58: Collectors: pump room of the water nightmare
entries.gt_3659f20c73e5e5: step off the wet line onto dry concrete
entries.gt_85adbb9305bad8: step off the wet straightaway and strike on cooldown
entries.gt_7f017d318ed23b: take the energy cells after shutting down the automaton
entries.gt_4a9348e47dea24: tape the swarm source with electrical tape or sealant
entries.gt_1bc2ff2a8058de: burn out the swarm source with fire
entries.gt_f5ef9bb04175c2: run through the short-lived bodies without clearing the source
entries.gt_be9e256a97ab49: find a safe Slimevik and trade feed for a sample
entries.gt_6df50738dce0e1: give food or medicine instead of killing
entries.gt_cf9e843ded3d80: keep your distance without a filter and container
entries.gt_81a9d333e24a31: leave the water for the dry lit edge
entries.gt_75613fbfd09de9: scrape off the toxic film after the grab
entries.gt_6f1b44903258b8: take the green sample only in an NII container
entries.gt_831b7439faf284: seal the seam with sealant or a block kit
entries.gt_3e030176b045e5: lead the Betonoed away from the weak wall with noise
entries.gt_450e4f505ac208: interrupt the gnaw-through with damage or fire
entries.gt_cd56534fac111b: risk the shortcut after the gnaw-through
entries.gt_8bd98dda8ae7ae: Collectors: Borshchevik on the service bypass
entries.gt_0f9a4a22b7c316: chop stems and clean sap without smoke
entries.gt_cb5d89eba456ee: bypass the overgrown corridor through the dry warehouse
entries.gt_f5b6b421080df6: burn it out fast and move away from the seed smoke
entries.gt_d39592c6e414ff: check the straight rods from a distance and survive the first lunge
entries.gt_909561b0918db3: grab the metal quickly with a risk of warehouse ambush
entries.gt_b8613f08a25753: make noise, leave the line, and close in after the beam
entries.gt_699956f0c70585: take PSI dust from the shot-up path
entries.gt_4b860ade0fac89: Klava Reverse. This is not a sign for believers, it is a machine. It makes door kits if you do not pour nonsense into the belt.
entries.gt_d8a6bc93fa714d: The blackbelts hold the output box. Workers pretend to repair things so they are not put under the press.
entries.gt_82c90c2174954b: Two gears into the feed and I will start the line. Let Omilyan explain it afterward however he wants.
entries.gt_608bc0734855ca: The machine is cutting metal again, not people. Progress already.
entries.gt_82ab43400ec918: If you hear steady knocking, that is not the cult. That is the machine working as a shop again, not a prayer room.
entries.gt_1ad6844a7c7166: The machine runs from the belt, the belt runs from the switch, and today I stand by the switch.
entries.gt_a7335783efe779: Three gray briquettes into the box and you get a door kit without a fight. This is not trade, it is a shift fee.
entries.gt_5f866d2a19dbcf: Do not touch finished kits without a mark. Stolen metal rings loudly on the way out.
entries.gt_836c50887c8cf7: Fee accepted. The machine will pretend you are one of ours.
entries.gt_4edeede64e220f: Go with the door. Closing openings is more useful than arguing with them.
entries.gt_1e9c977a2dff72: Petya Zero Phase. I am not against machines. I am against machines that have guards instead of masters.
entries.gt_2f7f1a1781f0d5: Two fuses into the reverse circuit and the belt stops without shooting. The workers survive; the guards lose a shift.
entries.gt_da1bfb41edf9ab: After that you can steal, or you can leave. The main thing is not to stand nearby when the switch meets the phase.
entries.gt_2d89e24bc47987: The line stalled. Good silence: in it, people are not counted as raw material.
entries.gt_ba2c4156f86661: The cult will look for someone to blame. Their queue is long; you can leave in time.
entries.gt_e597fbc6a0f2ca: Klava Reverse: "Two gears into the feed. We will start the machine as a shop, not as a blackbelt trough."
entries.gt_9ec825e6606375: Klava Reverse: "Omilyan holds the output box and the people. Remove him and the shift will take the machine back."
entries.gt_32a95b883d389f: Omilyan Blackbelt: "Three gray briquettes as machine fee. You get a door kit and passage without waiting at the belt."
entries.gt_d58d016cc84032: Petya Zero Phase: "Two fuses into the reverse circuit. The machine stops; the guards stay by an empty belt."
entries.gt_fb7d3cd9bff7f6: Door kit machine started by the workers.
entries.gt_8d4ea36d72c2a5: The captured workshop is issuing door kits to the shift again.
entries.gt_c572597b3d25dc: The shift took the machine back; the cult post by the line fell apart.
entries.gt_09a2f748003092: Workshop fee paid without a fight.
entries.gt_06d507428c9dfe: The guards let you through to the batch of door kits for briquettes.
entries.gt_17f1d5a6c9da9c: Machine drive silenced by reverse phase.
entries.gt_11cee8366fac23: The workshop belt stopped; the guards lost output, but the shop went quiet too.
entries.gt_c202e64feec0b8: Black Palm post by the workshop
entries.gt_3d44a56b670eb1: Finished batch from the cult workshop carried out without permission.
entries.gt_73095bcb152e39: Inna Pressova. The line did not break; it expressed its attitude toward the plan.
entries.gt_eb80befc8f2638: Raw material on the left, briquettes on the right. Between them, noise, steam, and people with bad teeth.
entries.gt_6a5b4ead276e85: Bring gears. Without them, the press only crushes fingers.
entries.gt_c361d8a46c234b: The press keeps rhythm. While it knocks, the queue upstairs eats.
entries.gt_962f68eaccca05: Do not take rejects from quarantine. They are warm, and not from the furnace.
entries.gt_8d5a5c4095aaf9: Roman Doser. I measure mass with a scoop because the scales fear the truth.
entries.gt_2a3cafdb76952c: The filtering layer is not for cleanliness. It is so the briquette holds shape.
entries.gt_f01ea304259a43: If the water smells of iron, it is fit for concentrate.
entries.gt_9cfd73f37897e8: The layer went into the doser. Now the briquette at least looks legal.
entries.gt_4a0b901cd051b4: Quality control said: look less at the color.
entries.gt_3968ea5e83c350: Klin. Liquidators hold the press because hungry people fight worse than armed ones.
entries.gt_ff4be4b092f2e4: Rebar is scraping in the reject zone. If it reaches the shafts, rations become shrapnel.
entries.gt_806598b81778a6: Want to help? Hit anything that moves against the shift.
entries.gt_97da3f9bd3a387: The line fought back. The guards count it as victory; accounting counts it as delay.
entries.gt_e900bed381f373: Cartridges are cheaper than a hunger riot.
entries.gt_09ec373b7a133b: Lyova Reject. A good warehouse has two exits: the official one and mine.
entries.gt_5b116628a4cef2: The gray briquettes will go to whoever shouts louder anyway. We just shout with a knife.
entries.gt_9c8b5a2e0cf713: Bring the batch and I will tell you where the shift closes its eyes.
entries.gt_3160c5cb9407e5: Now the warehouse breathes more freely.
entries.gt_71afd40c0d8c40: Do not touch the green ones. They sometimes touch back.
entries.gt_d560b0dd06656a: Inna: "Two gears on the main shaft. We repair the line before it gets closed as a hazardous object."
entries.gt_a0cc7e04dff09a: Roman: "Four filtering layers into the doser. Without them, the mass spreads like a protocol without a signature."
entries.gt_6bd45f7c3c1a87: Klin: "Rebar is heading for the shafts. Remove one before it becomes a press part."
entries.gt_9c4f09a7aae075: Lyova: "Four gray briquettes from the output warehouse. We will call it redistribution of noise."
entries.gt_85c903fbf987fb: Sweep code? No. Not this one. The mask hisses, the radio lies, the barrel holds steadier than the hand.
entries.gt_fc61e2bd8468a5: Do not rush up. Throw the bandage on the floor, show the counterfoil from a distance, do not touch the token without a witness.
entries.gt_45ccbd08b1e184: After the all-clear, what remained here was not a post. It was me, a shotgun, and an order with a number that no longer fits me.
entries.gt_6999be9193aa03: I remember less than I should. But at least I no longer shoot at a shadow by regulation.
entries.gt_5863fa4c5b7bd6: If Vyuga asks for the code, say: the twenty-first was extra.
entries.gt_b9fe0dd409d817: Vyuga at the radio point. If he has the wrong code, do not argue with the shotgun. Bring the roster; I will remove the post from the route.
entries.gt_a97549f77604d8: A live report is better than a dead body. A dead body usually loses cartridges too.
entries.gt_169a9a8edbc485: Report accepted. Now this corner has a reason not to shoot first.
entries.gt_7e4be5f47a4612: He is not a bandit. A bandit does not reload that evenly. Find the shift token and show him the number before the next shot.
entries.gt_a0074fe2cc3810: There is concrete behind the counter. After the shot, he has a long pause: then you can talk instead of climbing in chest-first.
entries.gt_6b9690114d6e87: The token worked. Bad that a person sometimes needs metal to remember a name.
entries.gt_43e35c470b4076: Remaining Liquidator: "Bandage. Not for the hands - for the mask. Approach slowly; I will lower the barrel and give you the spare filter."
entries.gt_7ce79dc7392326: Collectors: broken sweep post with a wrong code and a shotgun behind a concrete counter.
entries.gt_ee210bcba8543d: The Remaining Liquidator was helped with a bandage and filter after the failed sweep.
entries.gt_7fce21c1ba0bf5: Vyuga: "There should be a samosbor roster on the table. Bring it and I will take him off the route and record him not as a beast, but as a post failure."
entries.gt_af7ea6b106b392: Collectors: the roster lies by the failed sweep post next to the wrong-code screen.
entries.gt_4fb32d245af312: Wrong sweep code reported to Vyuga; the post was removed without execution.
entries.gt_d7476b07478bc4: Titov: "Bring the shift token from the box. Not to steal it - to show it. When he names his number, the shotgun gets heavier than the order."
entries.gt_88261cc18cd15b: Collectors: the shift token is hidden in the failed post's box; concrete counters give a pause after the shot.
entries.gt_94a16757034bba: The Remaining Liquidator was disarmed through the shift token and a witness.
entries.gt_099e08ae21f75f: The Remaining Liquidator received help. A debtor with a shotgun stayed in the corridor, not a trophy.
entries.gt_e24c2ac55aee12: Vyuga accepted the wrong-code report. The liquidators removed the post without a public reprisal.
entries.gt_ee7912efd457f8: The shift token returned a number to the man. The shotgun lowered without a shot, but the post box remembered it.
entries.gt_41160f3710f4a9: The Remaining Liquidator was finished off. The filter and buckshot are useful, but the guard is now down one man.
entries.gt_c620e5b5b56d1d: Shift box: token, buckshot, and torn filter
entries.gt_6e37380df94346: Vyuga radio point: report after all-clear
entries.gt_55ba9401c1b44a: Marfa Pumpova. The pump room lives while the seal holds and someone holds the key.
entries.gt_26bccb01f3ecc1: You can repair the pump, or you can rip open the emergency cabinet. Just run through the water fast afterward.
entries.gt_0bc3150fad21b8: Bring a door kit. I will close the return path, and you get a dry trail, at least on paper.
entries.gt_0da6946545b34d: Do not stand in a puddle while the lamp blinks. This is not advice, it is leftover experience.
entries.gt_18be467537fa56: If the water starts rising, close the valve, not your eyes. And hold the door while I climb to the gasket.
entries.gt_7e5e9dd7551034: The pump is patched. Not forever, but nobody here asked for forever.
entries.gt_0df9e071610ba1: If the water goes backward, do not stand there and do not argue with the pressure gauge.
entries.gt_a0ac7f01c1ad27: Yegor Shuntov, emergency warehouse. Whatever you took without an act is already rescue property.
entries.gt_53e947f1258869: There is a box in the bypass crawl. Behind the box is water. In the water are eels. A harpoon is expensive, bread is cheaper, the dry edge is free.
entries.gt_366a2e3b564e77: Need two wrenches. Ripping open the cabinet is easy; closing it back up is harder.
entries.gt_24bdbe69660d5a: The cabinet is back in accounting. Almost.
entries.gt_3556ac59e9e80a: If Marfa asks, I saw nothing. Especially you.
entries.gt_94f05c7238195d: Toma Drain. I turn on the lamps over the water so the darkness at least signs for itself.
entries.gt_bad5af01c78d07: A Lamper stands by the wet switch. While it is there, the emergency passage is only for the brave or the stupid.
entries.gt_30b1019cc0410b: An energy cell will wake the panel. Or sell it to Yegor if your conscience is waterproof.
entries.gt_2989db358b686a: Do not touch a wet relay. A wet relay asks first for a hand, then for a surname.
entries.gt_b2cada143b93e5: The panel holds the load. The lamps honestly show where not to stand.
entries.gt_fd14cad82b3639: The water shines, which means the path is visible. That is almost safety already.
entries.gt_7508ca01ffbba4: Marfa: "Bring a door kit for the check valve. We will repair the pump; hold the door and do not stand in the puddle."
entries.gt_8284b18b7d72e8: Marfa: "Two Tube Eels are gnawing the return line. Remove them or run when the water goes up."
entries.gt_af7ce199fff67c: Yegor: "Two wrenches from the emergency cabinet. Formally theft, practically redistribution of dryness."
entries.gt_46975cb126f81a: Yegor: "Kill the Lamper by the wet switch. It eats light, and we need light for the report."
entries.gt_3758576c98c61d: Toma: "Carry the energy cell to the panel. The lamps will show where the bypass crawl has not eaten the floor yet."
entries.gt_442079903fbbcc: Water cuts your step, the eel speeds up. Dry edge, harpoon, or bait.
entries.gt_5957404e8ee589: Heatline Zero rests on two things: do not touch the valve, and touch the valve on time.
entries.gt_2719f532ded23b: The scalded corridor is short. The safe bypass is wet and long. Choose for yourself.
entries.gt_64af087c3ed95a: Red lamps here do not illuminate; they warn.
entries.gt_84bb43feadd5d0: Pressure gauge, asbestos cord, and sealant mean a full repair. Pressure gauge with one part is only a temporary finish.
entries.gt_fc63a52166100c: Is the gasket dry? Then the valve can still be respected.
entries.gt_3d3076be505842: Steam does not listen to orders. It listens only to a closed valve and fast feet.
entries.gt_e93c7ba1ce92cb: Pressure released by the documents. Do not check it with your skin yet.
entries.gt_1bbbb41f9a12eb: If the hiss got quieter, the accident moved closer to the neighbors.
entries.gt_31ae776a2b8ff3: I run the bypass. It is not pretty, there is just less steam there.
entries.gt_ec95458f6f926d: The repair box is open. You can take everything, but then there will be nothing to repair with.
entries.gt_983f2bc4c4d631: Sabotage is also a solution. Just do not ask afterward why the pipes sing.
entries.gt_899d5a3bd5fa59: If you climb to the valve without parts, do not stand facing the lamp. One part without a pressure gauge also goes into steam.
entries.gt_46c57a78fdbe37: Hold the door while I place the mark. The bypass likes those who do not climb into the heat first.
entries.gt_6209c5d744d504: Bypass marked. If it vanishes after samosbor, the house changed its mind.
entries.gt_ea817a3acdc778: Asbestos cord is better held in the hands than in the lungs.
entries.gt_ebf1e4a6acc483: Zakhar: "Bring two asbestos cords. We will wrap the zero valve and let the corridor cool down, at least on paper."
entries.gt_f31677bd30a2b0: Zakhar: "Need a pressure gauge. Without the needle we do not know if this is repair, a final excursion, or the pipe calling by surname."
entries.gt_1f84f08171ff63: Mira: "Check the safe shower bypass {dir}. If there is still water, there is no need to climb into the scalded corridor."
entries.gt_0edea05b116757: Mira: "If you want to break the shift, bring a can of gasoline. We will write it up as overheating, not sabotage."
entries.gt_05329746dc227e: Heatline Zero: safe shower bypass heat 0
entries.gt_d63c86116c14d3: Bad wall without a work order
entries.gt_081f2ee9dcbbdc: Cut passage by the welding post
entries.gt_c9754a8a4126b7: The shift did not end. The people who remember the beginning ended.
entries.gt_b93cd91c503090: Put a gear on the cart and I will leave the shortcut to the workers. Put sealant there and I will weld it shut by act.
entries.gt_2cd8b7275b21aa: Show the bypass form through the job. Without a form, the wall counts as an error and must be corrected.
entries.gt_64cea8ee66aca3: Hold the door if you ask me to open it. Repair without a second hand quickly becomes an obituary.
entries.gt_a04fdf9864dcde: You did not steal the gasket? Then the conversation is short and useful.
entries.gt_f339000a4f236e: Work order accepted. The wall temporarily does not argue with the route.
entries.gt_8ffabf49e51e84: If the cart is not where it should be, someone has already decided for you.
entries.gt_3940a7ee65596c: Shortcut open. Do not thank me, just do not stand in the puddle by the panel.
entries.gt_f7546b69a71312: Repairman Without a Shift: "Elevator bypass form on the table. Without paper, the shortcut becomes a wall again, and you hold the door."
entries.gt_4bd8edeb8b8f9d: Repairman's work-order cart: place a part or sealant
entries.gt_956c69e3cf3c30: Personal locker of the shift that is gone
entries.gt_ade7f04a9bc725: Welding woke the automation by the bad wall.
entries.gt_34ebb8f6378fe7: After the Repairman's death, the automation took the fight for repair.
entries.gt_77faac30ade59b: The Repairman checked the form: the shortcut was left in the bypass scheme.
entries.gt_e8826f73a5aa96: The gear landed on the cart. The Repairman stepped back from the seam; the shortcut is open.
entries.gt_36dfcf44f734f4: Tool carried out without asking. The shortcut is opened, but the rumor of theft will go through the pipes.
entries.gt_8f40cc80c1553b: Repairman Without a Shift fell by the cart. There is no one left to weld the shortcut shut.
entries.gt_be1e767a1f8ec0: Shortcut welded shut under a local act. The bypass corridor remains open.
